title: Austrochloris dichanthioides
taxonomy: Austrochloris dichanthioides is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Austrochloris, which is a group of grasses native to Australia. The plant is further classified within the subfamily Chloridoideae, a group of grasses known for their adaptation to arid environments. Within the subfamily Chloridoideae, Austrochloris dichanthioides is placed in the tribe Eragrosteae. Further classification details may be refined with more specific taxonomic research.
